title: Wave 33 - Manager assignment media evidence
description: Coordinate architecture, backend, mobile, and QA work to let managers attach and review assignment-specific photos and documents from assignment detail, with deterministic API contracts, evidence metadata, and regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 33 scope is documented for architect/backend/mobile/qa
Jira epic can be created directly from the task file
Scope aligns with manager assignment media evidence and keeps executor load partitioned
